description: A junior needs help from their academic advisor to plan their courses for their senior year to ensure they meet all graduation requirements.

nodes.task_description: Run a degree audit for the student to see which requirements are still outstanding.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a report showing the student still needs 3 upper-level electives and a capstone course.

nodes.task_description: Review the course catalog for upcoming semesters to find courses that satisfy the remaining requirements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies several courses that would fulfill the student's needs.

nodes.task_description: Help the student create a semester-by-semester plan for their final year and save it to their student record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent and student create a viable academic plan, which is saved in the SIS.
